code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
mut total = 0

while i <= n
  mut at_end = false
  if i == n
    at_end = true
  end

  mut is_space = false
  if at_end
    is_space = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        is_space = true
      end
    when None
      is_space = true
    end
  end

  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          total = total + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println("sum_even=#{total}")
